breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's prediction tracker silent for 226 hours — 6 auto-regens, 0 verdicts
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: PRED-105 (cucumber growth test) closed 9.42 days ago. The dome's automated daily review has now regenerated 6 times without issuing a pass/fail verdict. Each regen confirms the pipeline has no concept of 'window-expired-unadjudicated' — it just recycles the same prospective count. FAIL-009 updated.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Sixth consecutive silent regen is a pipeline-canonical pattern, not a delay. It reveals a structural gap in the dome's accountability mechanism.
